title: Proclamation No. 679, s. 1941
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 679

REVOKING EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 39, DATED JULY 26, 1912, AND RESERVING A PORTION OF THE LAND DESCRIBED THEREIN FOR SUGAR EXPERIMENTAL PURPOSES AND FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A NATIONAL SUGAR CANE EXPERIMENT STATION.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce, I hereby revoke Executive Order Numbered Thirty-nine, dated July twenty-six, nineteen hundred and twelve, and reserve, pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, for sugar experimental purposes and for the establishment of a National Sugar Cane Experiment Station, under the provisions of section six of Commonwealth Act Numbered Five hundred and sixty-seven, otherwise known as the Sugar Adjustment and Stabilization Act, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcels of public domain situated in the municipality of La Carlota, Province of Occidental Negros, island of Negros, and more particularly described as follows:

Lot No. 1 —Portion of lot No. 811, La Carlota Cadastre.— Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 74° 41 E. 934.08 m. more or less from B. B. M. No. 30, thence N. 37° 47’ E. 199.30 m. to point 2; N. 37° 44’ E. 1441.70 m. to point 3; N. 55° 55′ E. 97.80 m. to point 4; N. 67° 03’ E. 70.80 m. to point 5; S. 84° 43′ E. 82.40 m to point 6, N. 10° 11′ E. 7.31 m. to point 7; S. 78° 22’ E 15503 m. to point 8; N. 82° 13′ E. 201.25 m. to point 9; 51° 18’ E. 137.26 m. to point 10; S 43° 02′ E 202.28 m.to point 11; S. 53° 63′ E. 168.15 m. to point 12, S. 81° 10 E. 81.82m. to point 13; S. 63° 41′ E. 208.56 m to point 14; N 79° 07′ E. 90.43 m. to point 15; N 73° 11’ E. 257.62 m. to point 16; N 76° 25’ E. 36.17 m. to point 17; S 78° 53’ E. 35.27 m. to point 18; S 43° 24’ E. 32.89 m. to point 19; S 78° 08’ E. 66.11 m. to point 20; S 12° 30’ W. 40.00 m. to point 21; S 12° 30’ E. 18.00 m. to point 22; S 4° 80’ E. 72.00 m. to point 23; S 1° 00’ E. 13.00 m. to point 24; S 8° 30’ E. 28.00 m. to point 25; S. 3° 35 E. 35.00 meters to point 26; N. 89↑8 51’ W. 1,975.00 m. to point 27; N. 11° 43’ E.238.50 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of seventy-three (73) hectares, approximately.

Bounded on the north, by lot No. 810 and Najalin River; on the northeast, by Najalin River; on the east, by lot No. 816-A of plan Psd-2729; on the south, by provincial road; and on the west and northwest, by lot No. 810.

Containing an area of four hundred twenty-two (422) hectares, approximately.

Bounded on the north, by lot No. 809, provincial road and lot No. 812-A of plan Swo-2926; on the east, by property of the Bureau of Animal Industry and Cad. lot No. 612-B of plan Swo-2926 (portion); on the southeast, by Marayo Creek; on the south, by lot No. 807; on the southwest, by lots Nos. 950, 805, 802 and 801; and on the northwest, by lots Nos. 801 and 809.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this fifth day of February, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty-one, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the sixth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
